site.title: Themadhood's Goods
site.tagline: Physical and digital goods created under the Themadhood ecosystem.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Goods handles physical and digital goods, including jewelry, creations, and trinkets.

footer.title: Themadhood's Goods
footer.line2: Themadhood's Goods operates as a parent entity for affiliated projects.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Goods
body: Themadhood's Goods is the physical and crafted goods division within the Themadhood ecosystem, focused on producing tangible creations and themed items connected to its projects and creative identity. The branch supports the design and production of handcrafted works, decorative items, and collectible goods while maintaining the visual style and themes associated with Themadhood.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Goods operates as both an independent creative workshop and a structured branch within the larger Themadhood ecosystem. Its purpose is to design and produce physical items that reflect the themes, ideas, and visual identity developed across Themadhood projects.

Through sub-branches dedicated to jewelry, stained glass creations, trinkets, and other handcrafted works, Themadhood's Goods provides a framework for organizing physical creations while allowing each line of products to develop its own style and focus. This structure ensures that goods remain connected to the broader creative ecosystem while still supporting unique craftsmanship and experimentation.

items.title: Themadhood's Jewelry
items.body: Jewelry and wearable items created under Themadhood goods, including themed pieces and limited releases.

items.title: Themadhood's Stained Glass
items.body: Stained glass pieces created under Themadhood Goods, including decorative panels, themed designs, and limited handcrafted works.

items.title: Themadhood's Creations
items.body: Handmade and crafted items, including mixed-media builds and unique project creations.

items.title: Themadgood's Trinkets
items.body: Small goods, accessories, and collectible trinkets released under Themadhood goods.

items.title: Themadgood's Art
items.body: Artworks, illustrations, and visual creations produced and released under Themadhood's creative branches, including original pieces and curated visual projects.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific goods subtree, including custom or experimental goods.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
